---
title: "Francisque Michel"
---

## Francisque Michel

**Dates:** (1809-1887)

### Description

French author and translator

### Biography

His translations of Tennyson included <i>Viviane</i> (1868) and <i>Genièvre</i> (1868).

### Letters

- Letter from June 14th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
